basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) Recruitment 2026: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 2 Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ACTREC Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ACTREC Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ACTREC Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ACTREC Scientific Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) position at ACTREC is scheduled for 01 July 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Scientific Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. or B.Tech degree in Biochemistry, Chemistry, Microbiology, Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Analytical Chemistry, Biophysics, or a similar discipline with a minimum of 50% marks from a government-recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Scientific Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 35,400/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Interested and eligible candidates need to attend the walk-in interview directly.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Scientific Assistant (CRI Labs) role will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are evaluated based on their performance during the interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ACTREC located?
faq.answer: ACTREC is located in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 410210. Candidates should report to the specified venue in Navi Mumbai for the walk-in interview.
